title: Trigonochilum funis

intro: Trigonochilum funis, also known as the Funis Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The Funis Plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of Trigonochilum funis include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the Funis Plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or ointment to treat various health conditions.
